ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who performed the song */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the song was released */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the song in a particular chart or list */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the song */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song contains explicit content */,
  "is_single" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song is a single */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer who produced the song */,
  "composer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the composer who wrote the song */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the song */,
  "record_label" TEXT /* Name of the record label */,
  "lyricist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lyricist who wrote the lyrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist performs */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the artist */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the artist */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the artist is currently active */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the artist's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the source was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_sources" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the genre was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the genre was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date and time the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_staff" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has staff privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song involved in the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., play, search, download) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the activity */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user performing the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being ranked */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the song */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the ranking */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart the ranking is based on */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source providing the ranking */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in rank compared to the previous period */,
  "peak_rank" INTEGER /* Highest rank the song has achieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_rankings_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_rankings_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_rankings_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the chart */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chart */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the chart updates */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the chart was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the chart is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_entries" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the song entered the chart */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the song on the chart */,
  "peak_rank" INTEGER /* Highest rank the song has achieved on the chart */,
  "weeks_on_chart" INTEGER /* Number of weeks the song has been on the chart */,
  "peak_week" TEXT /* Week the song achieved its peak rank */,
  "entry_type" TEXT /* Type of entry (e.g., new entry, re-entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lyrics" (
  "lyric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lyric */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the lyric belongs to */,
  "lyric" TEXT /* Lyric of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lyric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lyrics_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)
